## How it's calculated

Calculate your AWS EC2 instance monthly costs instantly and free.

This calculator applies the formula with your input values, checking typical ranges and alerting you if values fall outside reasonable parameters.

## Final notes

This calculation is a reference estimate only. For critical decisions (financial, medical, legal), consult a specialized professional. Pricing data is current as of 2026 and reviewed regularly.

faq.q: What's the difference between AWS EC2 on-demand and reserved instances?
faq.a: On-demand instances are billed hourly with no commitment; reserved instances require a 1-3 year commitment but offer 30-70% discounts.
Spot instances are spare capacity offered at up to 90% discount, but AWS can interrupt them with 2 minutes notice.

faq.q: How is AWS EC2 data transfer charged?
faq.a: Outbound data transfer costs $0.09/GB; inbound transfer is free.

faq.q: What is egress and why is it a hidden cost?
faq.a: Egress refers to outbound data transfer from AWS. It's often the biggest hidden cost in cloud infrastructure.

faq.q: What is the official AWS Pricing Calculator?
faq.a: AWS Pricing Calculator is the official tool from Amazon for estimating cloud costs across all AWS services.

faq.q: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.a: Yes, all our calculators are completely free and require no registration.
Results are estimative. We use internationally validated formulas. For critical cases, consult a professional.

faq.q: Do you store my calculation data?
faq.a: No. All calculations happen in your browser. We never send data to any server.
